topics.label: How it was made / product demo

quotes: Genuinely sobbing at the “PASS THE PEPPER” bit, like at the very least the AI isn’t even trained to say, “I can’t do that, I don’t have arms”. I feel like this…

takeaways.title: People are here for the bits
takeaways.detail: The thread is mostly positive/neutral, and the most-liked comments quote specific moments (e.g. "PASS THE PEPPER").

takeaways.title: High curiosity about the AI’s limits
takeaways.detail: Questions make up 16% of comments (170 total), often probing what Valentine can/can’t do and how the app works.

takeaways.title: Suggestions are follow-up video ideas
takeaways.detail: Suggestions are 6% of comments (63 total), frequently recommending similar games/apps (e.g. Love and Deepspace).
